parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, request_id: $("Normalize Async Input").first().json.request_id, status: "queued", message: "Solicitud recibida y en proceso" } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const core = $json; const input = $('Normalize Async Input').first().json; const result = core.result || {};
return [{ json: { ...core, callback_url: input.callback_url, callback_token: 'REPLACE_WITH_CALLBACK_SHARED_TOKEN', callback_payload: { request_id: core.request_id, project_id: input.project_id || null, status: core.status || 'completed', progress: 100, current_stage: 'completed', completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), engine_version: 'IASE_v5_CORE_v2.3', workflow_version: input.meta?.workflow_version || 'v2.3-chat-webhook-async', result: result, metrics: core.metrics || {}, error: null } } }];

const core = $json; const input = $('Normalize Async Input').first().json; const errorMessage = core?.error?.message || core?.message || 'Strategy Engine Core returned an invalid response'; const errorCode = core?.error?.code || 'ENGINE_OUTPUT_INVALID';
return [{ json: { request_id: input.request_id, project_id: input.project_id || null, callback_url: input.callback_url, callback_token: 'REPLACE_WITH_CALLBACK_SHARED_TOKEN', error_code: errorCode, error_message: errorMessage, callback_payload: { request_id: input.request_id, project_id: input.project_id || null, status: 'failed', progress: 100, current_stage: 'failed', completed_at: new Date().toISOString(), engine_version: 'IASE_v5_CORE_v2.3', workflow_version: input.meta?.workflow_version || 'v2.3-chat-webhook-async', result: null, metrics: core.metrics || {}, error: { code: errorCode, message: errorMessage } } } }];
